title: May it Last: A Portrait of the Avett Brothers
original_title: May It Last: A Portrait of the Avett Brothers
overview: An intimate portrait of the acclaimed North Carolina band The Avett Brothers, charting their decade-and-a- half rise, while chronicling their present-day collaboration with famed producer Rick Rubin on the multi-Grammy-nominated album “True Sadness.”
